overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's downtown district. The player moves from a covered sidewalk under an elevated highway, across a neon-lit intersection with holographic advertisements, and toward a commercial building with large digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated transit highway

events.description: approaching the end of the covered walkway as the open intersection becomes visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead in the same direction along the sidewalk
futuristic sedan driving past on the street to the left

entered.detail: massive concrete and metal elevated highway or monorail track running overhead
large cylindrical industrial pipes running parallel to the walkway ceiling
glowing red and blue advertisement panels mounted on the right wall
futuristic kiosk or booth structure on the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a covered sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway structure. Industrial pipes run overhead alongside the concrete transit structure. Neon advertisements glow on the right wall while vehicles pass on the left. The camera moves forward toward the light at the end of the covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: major urban intersection surrounded by towering neon-lit skyscrapers

events.description: exits the covered walkway into the open intersection with full view of the neon cityscape
crossing the multi-lane street at the crosswalk alongside other pedestrians
turning right to continue under the overpass structure on the far side

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection surrounded by crowds and towering holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street in the same direction
futuristic vehicle waiting at the traffic light

entered.detail: tall futuristic glass and steel buildings with illuminated windows and neon accents
massive floating holographic billboards and neon signs on distant skyscrapers
steam or smoke rising from street vents adding atmospheric haze
tall traffic signal posts with illuminated red and green lights

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a vast neon-lit intersection surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers. Holographic advertisements float above the streets as steam rises from vents. The camera crosses the multi-lane road with a crowd of pedestrians, then turns right to enter another covered area beneath the highway overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street under overpass with large digital billboard

events.description: enters the covered area beneath the overpass after crossing the intersection
large illuminated advertisement billboard becomes prominently visible on the right
red delivery van drives past from right to left in front of the camera

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk under the overpass toward a building with a prominent holographic advertisement

notable_agents.action: red delivery van driving past on the street in front of the camera
person walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive illuminated billboard displaying a woman in purple clothing with a small dog
orange metal barriers lining the edge of the sidewalk
dark building facade with illuminated signage and entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under another section of the elevated highway into a darker, more enclosed commercial street. Orange safety barriers line the sidewalk as the camera approaches a building featuring a massive illuminated billboard. A red van drives past on the street while pedestrians walk in the opposite direction. The segment ends near the corner with the large digital advertisement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a claustrophobic industrial underpass into a sprawling neon metropolis before retreating back into a dense commercial corridor. It begins on a covered sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway, moving past overhead pipes and glowing wall advertisements toward a bright opening. As the camera emerges from the walkway, the scene expands into a vast, light-drenched intersection where holographic advertisements float between towering glass skyscrapers and steam rises from the street. The camera then crosses the multi-lane road through a crowd of pedestrians before turning right to enter another enclosed area beneath the highway overpass. Finally, the environment shifts into a darker commercial street lined with orange safety barriers, passing a red van and pedestrians to arrive at a building dominated by a massive illuminated billboard.
